topic: 72-hour fast triggers Nobel-Prize autophagy process against cancer
caption: Did you know a 72-hour fast can trigger autophagy, a Nobel-Prize winning process that helps fight cancer? 🏆💡 Autophagy is your body's natural way of recycling damaged cells and proteins. 💸 When you fast, your body starts to break down and recycle damaged components, which can help prevent cancer. 🌟 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. #autophagy #fasting #cancerprevention #cellregeneration #healthyliving
